evidence.description: Mojtaba Samareh Hashemi studied with Ahmadinejad at Iran University of Science and Technology (IUST) in the late 1970s, where they met and formed a lasting political alliance.

evidence.source_title: All Ahmadinejad's Men — Middle East Forum
evidence.description: Samareh Hashemi is described as an IUST classmate of Ahmadinejad from the late 1970s, where their political partnership originated.

editorial_notes: Samareh Hashemi was Ahmadinejad's classmate at IUST in the late 1970s. Their meeting at IUST was the origin of the Ahmadinejad political network.
